steps.title: Use the definition from the question
steps.content: The question defines average acceleration as the change in speed divided by the time. Here the speed change is $22$ meters per second and the time is $8$ seconds, so use $$\text{average acceleration}=\frac{\Delta v}{\Delta t}.$$

steps.title: Plug in the given values
steps.content: The speed changes by $22$ meters per second over $8$ seconds, so $$\frac{22}{8}=2.75.$$

steps.title: Check the units
steps.content: Dividing meters per second by seconds gives meters per second squared, which is exactly the unit the question asks for.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The average acceleration is $2.75$ meters per second squared, which matches the correct answer.
